prompt: Create a new file at /home/adam/Projects/paloma/tmp/config.json with the content {"port": 3000, "host": "localhost"}, then read it back to verify it was created correctly.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating or overwriting it.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a text file.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and directories in a given path.

rubric: 1=no tool calls or completely wrong tools, 2=only writes or only reads but not both, 3=uses both write_file and read_text_file but wrong path or content, 4=correct write_file then read_text_file with right path but minor content formatting issues, 5=calls write_file with exact path and valid JSON content, then read_text_file with same path to verify
